description: Embeds the process of revealing characters and finding matches into a large, structured Markov chain. The asymptotic growth rate (upper bound) is then tightly constrained by the spectral radius of the transition matrix.
analogical_connections: The maximal average alignment rate is analogous to the dominant resonance frequency (largest eigenvalue) of the sequence-generating dynamic system.
implementation_hypothesis: Construct a symbolic transition matrix for a k-lookahead matching process. Compute the dominant eigenvalue using power iteration and optimize over k.
experiment_seed: Build transition matrices for k=1 to 5 and plot the sequence of spectral bounds.
experimental_result: Spectral embedding explored theoretically; no implementation attempted.
